data.heading.summary: best way to save what you love
data.support.github: check out cobalt's source code, contribute changes, or report issues
data.support.discord: chat with the community and developers about cobalt or ask for help
data.support.twitter: follow cobalt's updates and development on your twitter timeline
data.support.telegram: stay up to date with latest cobalt updates via a telegram channel
data.support.bluesky: follow cobalt's updates and development on your bluesky feed
data.support.description.issue: if you want to report a bug or some other recurring issue, please do it on github.
data.support.description.help: use discord for any other questions. describe the issue properly in #cobalt-support or else no one will be able help you.
data.support.description.best-effort: all support is best effort and not guaranteed, a reply might take some time.

data.reset_settings.title: reset all settings?
data.reset_settings.body: are you sure you want to reset all settings? this action is immediate and irreversible.
data.picker.title: select what to save
data.picker.description.desktop: click an item to save it. images can also be saved via the right click menu.
data.picker.description.phone: press an item to save it. images can also be saved with a long press.
data.picker.description.ios: press an item to save it with a shortcut. images can also be saved with a long press.
data.saving.title: choose how to save
data.saving.blocked: cobalt tried opening the file in a new tab, but your browser blocked it. you can allow pop-ups for cobalt to prevent this from happening next time.
data.saving.timeout: cobalt tried saving the file automatically, but your browser stopped it. you have to select a preferred method manually.
data.safety.title: important safety notice
data.import.body:
importing unknown or corrupted files may unexpectedly alter or break cobalt functionality. only import files that you've personally exported and haven't modified. if you were asked to import this file by someone - don't do it.

we are not responsible for any harm caused by importing unknown setting files.
data.safety.custom_instance.body:
custom instances can potentially pose privacy & safety risks.

bad instances can:
1. redirect you away from cobalt and try to scam you.
2. log all information about your requests, store it forever, and use it to track you.
3. serve you malicious files (such as malware).
4. force you to watch ads, or make you pay for downloading.

after this point, we can't protect you. please be mindful of what instances to use and always trust your gut. if anything feels off, come back to this page, reset the custom instance, and report it to us on github.
data.clear_cache.title: clear all cache?
data.clear_cache.body: all files from the processing queue will be removed and on-device features will take longer to load. this action is immediate and irreversible.

data.banner.title:
Support a safe
and open Internet
data.banner.subtitle:
donate to imput or share the
joy of cobalt with a friend
data.body.motivation: cobalt helps producers, educators, video makers, and many others to do what they love. it's a different kind of service that is made with love, not for profit.
data.body.no_bullshit: we believe that the internet doesn't have to be scary, which is why cobalt will never have ads or other kinds of malicious content. it's a promise that we firmly stand by. everything we do is built with privacy, accessibility, and ease of use in mind, making cobalt available for everyone.
data.body.keep_going: if you found cobalt useful, please consider supporting our work! you can help us by making a donation or sharing cobalt with a friend. every donation is highly appreciated and helps us keep working on cobalt and other projects.
data.share.title: share cobalt with a friend
data.alternative.title: alternative ways to donate
data.alt.copy: {{ value }}. crypto wallet address. press to copy.

data.import.no_data: there are no settings to load from this file. are you sure it's the right one?
data.import.invalid: this file doesn't have valid cobalt settings to import. are you sure it's the right one?
data.import.unknown:
couldn't load data from the file. it may be corrupted or of wrong format. here's the error i got:

{{ value }}
data.tunnel.probe: couldn't test this tunnel. your browser or network configuration may be blocking access to one of cobalt servers. are you sure you don't have any weird browser extensions?
data.captcha_too_long: cloudflare turnstile is taking too long to check if you're not a bot. try again, but if it takes way too long again, you can try: disabling weird browser extensions, changing networks, using a different browser, or checking your device for malware.
data.pipeline.missing_response_data: the processing instance didn't return required file info, so i can't create a local processing pipeline for you. try again in a few seconds and report the issue if it sticks!

data.embed.description: cobalt lets you save what you love without ads, tracking, paywalls or other nonsense. just paste the link and you're ready to rock!

data.title: processing queue
data.stub:
nothing here yet, just the two of us.
try downloading something!

data.bullet.purpose.title: what does remux do?
data.bullet.purpose.description: remux fixes any issues with the file container, such as missing time info. it helps increase compatibility with old software, such as vegas pro and windows media player.
data.bullet.explainer.title: how does it work?
data.bullet.explainer.description: remuxing takes existing codec data and copies it over to a new media container. it's lossless; media data doesn't get re-encoded.
data.bullet.privacy.title: on-device processing
data.bullet.privacy.description: cobalt remuxes files locally. files never leave your device, so processing is nearly instant.

data.services.title: supported services
data.services.disclaimer: support for a service does not imply affiliation, endorsement, or any form of support other than technical compatibility.
data.tutorial.title: how to save on ios?
data.tutorial.intro: to save media conveniently on ios, you'll need to use a companion siri shortcut from the share sheet.
data.tutorial.step.2: press the "share" button in cobalt's saving dialog.
data.tutorial.step.3: select the respective shortcut in the share sheet.
data.tutorial.outro: these shortcuts will work only from the cobalt app, sharing links from other apps will not work.
data.tooltip.captcha: cloudflare turnstile is checking if you're not a bot, please wait!

data.theme.description: auto theme switches between light and dark themes depending on your device's display mode.
data.video.quality.description: if preferred video quality isn't available, next best is picked instead.
data.video.youtube.codec.description:
h264: best compatibility, average quality. max quality is 1080p. 
av1: best quality and efficiency. supports 8k & HDR. 
vp9: same quality as av1, but file is ~2x bigger. supports 4k & HDR.

av1 and vp9 aren't widely supported, you might have to use additional software to play/edit them. cobalt picks next best codec if preferred one isn't available.
data.video.youtube.container.description: when "auto" is selected, cobalt will pick the best container automatically depending on selected codec: mp4 for h264; webm for vp9/av1.
data.video.youtube.hls.title: prefer hls for video & audio
data.video.youtube.hls.description:
only h264 and vp9 codecs are available in this mode. original audio codec is aac, it's re-encoded for compatibility, audio quality may be slightly worse than the non-HLS counterpart.

this option is experimental, it may go away or change in the future.
data.video.twitter.gif.title: convert looping videos to GIF
data.video.twitter.gif.description: GIF conversion is inefficient, converted file may be obnoxiously big and low quality.
data.video.h265.title: allow h265 for videos
data.video.h265.description: allows downloading videos from platforms like tiktok in higher quality at cost of compatibility.
data.audio.format.description: all formats but "best" are converted from the source format, there will be some quality loss. when "best" format is selected, the audio is kept in its original format whenever possible.
data.audio.bitrate.description: bitrate is applied only when converting audio to a lossy format. cobalt can't improve the source audio quality, so choosing a bitrate over 128kbps may inflate the file size with no audible difference. perceived quality may vary by format.
data.audio.youtube.dub.title: preferred dub language
data.audio.youtube.dub.description: cobalt will use a dubbed audio track for selected language if it's available. if not, original will be used instead.
data.subtitles.title: preferred subtitle language
data.subtitles.description:
cobalt will add subtitles to the downloaded file in the preferred language if they're available.

some services don't have a language selection, and if that's the case, cobalt will add the only available subtitle track if you have any language selected.
data.audio.youtube.better_audio.title: prefer better quality
data.audio.youtube.better_audio.description: cobalt will try to pick highest quality audio in audio mode. it may not be available depending on youtube's response, current traffic, and server status. custom instances may not support this option.
data.audio.tiktok.original.title: download original sound
data.audio.tiktok.original.description: cobalt will download the sound from the video without any changes by the post's author.
data.metadata.filename.description: filename style will only be used for files tunneled by cobalt. some services don't support filename styles other than classic.
data.metadata.disable.title: disable file metadata
data.metadata.disable.description: title, artist, and other info will not be added to the file.
data.saving.title: saving method
data.saving.description: preferred way of saving the file or link from cobalt. if preferred method is unavailable or something goes wrong, cobalt will ask you what to do next.
data.accessibility.transparency.title: reduce visual transparency
data.accessibility.transparency.description: transparency of surfaces will be reduced and all blur effects will be disabled. may also improve ui performance on less powerful devices.
data.accessibility.motion.title: reduce motion
data.accessibility.motion.description: animations and transitions will be disabled whenever possible.
data.accessibility.haptics.title: disable haptics
data.accessibility.haptics.description: all haptic effects will be disabled.
data.accessibility.auto_queue.title: don't open the queue automatically
data.accessibility.auto_queue.description: the processing queue will not be opened automatically whenever a new item is added to it. progress will still be displayed and you will still be able to open it manually.
data.language.auto.title: automatic selection
data.language.auto.description: cobalt will use your browser's default language if translation is available. if not, english will be used instead.
data.language.preferred.title: preferred language
data.language.preferred.description:
this language will be used when automatic selection is disabled. any text that isn't translated will be displayed in english.

some languages use community-sourced translations, they may be inaccurate or incomplete.
data.privacy.analytics.title: don't contribute to analytics
data.privacy.analytics.description:
anonymous traffic analytics are needed to get an approximate number of active cobalt users. no identifiable information about you is ever stored. all processed data is anonymized and aggregated.

we use a self-hosted plausible instance that doesn't use cookies and is fully compliant with GDPR, CCPA, and PECR.
data.privacy.analytics.learnmore: learn more about plausible's dedication to privacy.
data.privacy.tunnel.title: always tunnel files
data.privacy.tunnel.description: cobalt will hide your ip address, browser info, and bypass local network restrictions. when enabled, files will also have readable filenames that otherwise would be gibberish.
data.advanced.debug.title: enable features for nerds
data.advanced.debug.description: gives you easy access to app info that can be useful for debugging. enabling this does not affect functionality of cobalt in any way.
data.processing.enable_custom.title: use a custom processing server
data.processing.enable_custom.description:
cobalt will use a custom processing instance if you choose to. even though cobalt has some security measures in place, we are not responsible for any damages done via a community instance, as we have no control over them.

please be mindful of what instances you use and make sure they're hosted by people you trust.
data.processing.access_key.title: use an instance access key
data.processing.access_key.description: cobalt will use this key to make requests to the processing instance instead of other authentication methods. make sure the instance supports api keys!
data.local.saving.description:
when downloading media, remuxing and transcoding will be done on-device instead of the cloud. you'll see detailed progress in the processing queue.

disabled: local processing will not be used. processing instances can enforce local processing, so this option may not have effect.
preferred: media that requires extra processing will be downloaded through the processing queue, but the rest of media will be downloaded by your browser's download manager.
forced: all media will always be proxied and downloaded through the processing queue.

exclusive on-device features are not affected by this setting, they always run locally.
data.local.webcodecs.title: use webcodecs for on-device processing
data.local.webcodecs.description:
when decoding or encoding files, cobalt will try to use webcodecs. this feature allows for GPU-accelerated processing of media files, meaning that all decoding & encoding will be way faster.

availability and stability of this feature depends on your device's and browser's capabilities. stuff might break or not work properly.
data.tabs.hide_remux.description: if you don't use the remux tool, you can hide it from the navigation bar.

data.auth.jwt.missing: couldn't authenticate with the processing instance because the access token is missing. try again in a few seconds or reload the page!
data.auth.jwt.invalid: couldn't authenticate with the processing instance because the access token is invalid. try again in a few seconds or reload the page!
data.auth.turnstile.missing: couldn't authenticate with the processing instance because the captcha solution is missing. try again in a few seconds or reload the page!
data.auth.turnstile.invalid: couldn't authenticate with the processing instance because the captcha solution is invalid. try again in a few seconds or reload the page!
data.auth.key.missing: an access key is required to use this processing instance but it's missing. add it in instance settings!
data.auth.key.not_api_key: an access key is required to use this processing instance but it's missing. add it in instance settings!
data.auth.key.invalid: the access key is invalid. reset it in instance settings and use a proper one!
data.auth.key.not_found: the access key you used couldn't be found. are you sure this instance has your key?
data.auth.key.invalid_ip: your ip address couldn't be parsed. something went very wrong. report this issue!
data.auth.key.ip_not_allowed: your ip address is not allowed to use this access key. use a different instance or network!
data.auth.key.ua_not_allowed: your user agent is not allowed to use this access key. use a different client or device!
data.unreachable: couldn't connect to the processing instance. check your internet connection and try again!
data.timed_out: the processing instance took too long to respond. it may be overwhelmed at the moment, try again in a few seconds!
data.rate_exceeded: you're making too many requests. try again in {{ limit }} seconds.
data.capacity: cobalt is at capacity and can't process your request at the moment. try again in a few seconds!
data.generic: something went wrong and i couldn't get anything for you, try again in a few seconds. if the issue sticks, please report it!
data.unknown_response: couldn't read the response from the processing instance. this is probably caused by the web app being out of date. reload the app and try again!
data.invalid_body: couldn't send the request to the processing instance. this is probably caused by the web app being out of date. reload the app and try again!
data.service.unsupported: this service is not supported yet. have you pasted the right link?
data.service.disabled: this service is generally supported by cobalt, but it's disabled on this processing instance. try a link from another service!
data.service.audio_not_supported: this service doesn't support audio extraction. try a link from another service!
data.link.invalid: your link is invalid or this service is not supported yet. have you pasted the right link?
data.link.unsupported: {{ service }} is supported, but i couldn't recognize your link. have you pasted the right one?
data.fetch.fail: something went wrong when fetching info from {{ service }} and i couldn't get anything for you. if this issue sticks, please report it!
data.fetch.critical: the {{ service }} module returned an error that i don't recognize. try again in a few seconds, but if this issue sticks, please report it!
data.fetch.critical.core: one of the core modules returned an error that i don't recognize. try again in a few seconds, but if this issue sticks, please report it!
data.fetch.empty: couldn't find any media that i could download for you. are you sure you pasted the right link?
data.fetch.rate: the processing instance got rate limited by {{ service }}. try again in a few seconds!
data.fetch.short_link: couldn't get info from the short link. are you sure it works? if it does and you still get this error, please report this issue!
data.content.too_long: media you requested is too long. the duration limit on this instance is {{ limit }} minutes. try something shorter instead!
data.content.video.unavailable: i can't access this video. it may be restricted on {{ service }}'s side. try a different link!
data.content.video.live: this video is currently live, so i can't download it yet. wait for the live stream to finish and try again!
data.content.video.private: this video is private, so i can't access it. change its visibility or try another one!
data.content.video.age: this video is age-restricted, so i can't access it anonymously. try again or try a different link!
data.content.video.region: this video is region locked, and the processing instance is in a different location. try a different link!
data.content.region: this content is region locked, and the processing instance is in a different location. try a different link!
data.content.paid: this content requires purchase. cobalt can't download paid content. try a different link!
data.content.post.unavailable: couldn't find anything about this post. its visibility may be limited or it may not exist. make sure your link works and try again in a few seconds!
data.content.post.private: couldn't get anything about this post because it's from a private account. try a different link!
data.content.post.age: this post is age-restricted, so i can't access it anonymously. try again or try a different link!
data.youtube.no_matching_format: youtube didn't return any acceptable formats. cobalt may not support them or they're re-encoding on youtube's side. try again a bit later, but if this issue sticks, please report it!
data.youtube.decipher: youtube updated its decipher algorithm and i couldn't extract the info about the video. try again in a few seconds, but if this issue sticks, please report it!
data.youtube.login: couldn't get this video because youtube asked the processing instance to prove that it's not a bot. try again in a few seconds, but if it still doesn't work, please report this issue!
data.youtube.token_expired: couldn't get this video because the youtube token expired and wasn't refreshed. try again in a few seconds, but if it still doesn't work, please report this issue!
data.youtube.no_hls_streams: couldn't find any matching HLS streams for this video. try downloading it without HLS!
data.youtube.api_error: youtube updated something about its api and i couldn't get any info about this video. try again in a few seconds, but if this issue sticks, please report it!
data.youtube.disabled_main_instance:
youtube downloading is disabled on the main instance due to restrictions from youtube's side and infinite maintenance cost at scale.

we apologize for the inconvenience and encourage you to host your own API instance for this.
data.youtube.drm: this youtube video is protected by widevine DRM, so i can't download it. try a different link!
data.youtube.no_session_tokens: couldn't get required session tokens for youtube. this may be caused by a restriction on youtube's side. try again in a few seconds, but if this issue sticks, please report it!

data.generic_error: processing worker crashed, see console for details
data.fetch.crashed: fetch worker crashed, see console for details
data.fetch.no_file_reader: couldn't write a file to cache
data.fetch.empty_tunnel: file tunnel is empty, try again in a few minutes
data.fetch.corrupted_file: file wasn't downloaded fully, try again
data.fetch.network_error: downloading was interrupted by a network issue
data.ffmpeg.probe_failed: couldn't probe this file, it may be unsupported or corrupted
data.ffmpeg.out_of_memory: not enough available memory, can't continue
data.ffmpeg.crashed: ffmpeg worker crashed, see console for details
data.ffmpeg.no_render: ffmpeg render is empty, something very odd happened
data.ffmpeg.no_args: ffmpeg worker didn't get required arguments
data.ffmpeg.no_audio_channel: this video has no audio track, nothing to do

data.share.qr.collapse: expanded qr code. press to collapse.

data.status.completed: processing queue. all tasks are completed.

data.link_area.turnstile: link input area. checking if you're not a robot.
